name: delete_event
description: Delete an event from the operator's Google Calendar by its event_id. This cancels the event (and notifies attendees) and cannot be undone, so confirm the event_id is correct first.

event_id.description: The event id to delete (from list_events).

calendar_id.description: Optional. Calendar id the event lives on (default 'primary').

operator.description: Optional. If omitted, resolves to the BlackBox's current operator (single operator auto-selected; otherwise the system default). Do not hard-code an operator name.

returns: JSON {deleted: true, event_id} on success (or an error string).
notes: Requires Google Workspace connected for the operator. Deletion cannot be undone and will cancel the event for attendees — verify the event_id with list_events before deleting. Pass calendar_id if the event is not on 'primary'.
